items.title: 2,426 Ozark listings now scored for investment
items.body: Every active LandWatch / United Country / LandHub / Mossy Oak listing in MO + AR now carries an InvestmentScore composing value-vs-comps, soil class, flood risk, and county macro signals. Sort by 'Investment Score (AI)' on Browse to surface the strongest fundamentals first.

items.title: Ozark rural counties shifted ~10pp further R in 2024
items.body: We re-stamped county voting from a 2024 source. Reynolds, Carter, Wayne, and Howell counties (MO) all moved 9-12pp toward R from 2020 — useful context for buyers thinking about local culture and zoning trajectory.

items.title: Buffalo River corridor: 5 new homestead-grade listings under $150k
items.body: Searcy, Newton, and Marion counties saw a small wave of <50-acre tracts with at least one creek or well in the past two weeks. Most carry 'utilities on-site' and stay below the $5k/acre line.
